en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid form in the Netherlands Workers Compensation Insurance Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
Please upload a copy of your company's registration with Belastingdienst, confirming your company’s compliance with employee insurance schemes.
Please upload a copy of your company's employee insurance registration with UWV, confirming your company’s compliance with employee insurance schemes.

As insurance policies are typically renewed annually, an updated certificate should be provided every year to confirm continuous coverage for potential work-related injuries or illnesses. These documents show that the employer is covered for potential work-related injuries or illnesses.
Please upload your Annual Employer Liability Insurance Certificate issued by your insurance provider, confirming your company’s compliance with employee insurance schemes.
